name: RBS PDF Editor
seoTitle: Free PDF Editor for Windows — No Watermark, No Signup, No Subscription | RBS PDF Editor
seoDescription: Free PDF editor for Windows 10/11. Edit text, OCR scans, sign, merge & convert PDFs. No watermark, no signup, offline. Adobe Acrobat alternative.
description: A free, offline, portable Windows PDF editor. Edit text in place, place images freeform with resize and rotate, OCR scanned papers with Tesseract, sign documents in one click, merge / split / rotate / reorder pages, convert PDF to Word / Excel / JPG / PNG, compress PDFs, add Bates numbering, password protection, hyperlinks and watermarks. Two builds shipped together — a standard installer that registers PDF file associations, and a single-file portable .exe that runs from a USB stick with no install and no admin rights. No account, no cloud, no telemetry, no watermark, no subscription. A genuine free Adobe Acrobat alternative for Windows 10 and Windows 11.
fileSize: 216 MB ZIP (Installer + Portable, ~108 MB each inside)

features.title: Edit text in place
features.desc: Click any word on the PDF and the text becomes editable right where it sits — same font, same size, no copy-paste dance.

features.title: Place images freeform
features.desc: Drop in a picture, drag the corner and edge handles to resize, rotate, or snap to page width. Click it later to adjust or delete.

features.title: OCR scanned PDFs
features.desc: Make scans searchable and editable. Tesseract installs itself the first time you ask, then runs offline forever.

features.title: One-click signature
features.desc: Draw your signature once with the mouse. After that, drop it on any document in one click. Saved only on your computer.

features.title: Tabs, not windows
features.desc: Open multiple PDFs in browser-style tabs. Double-clicking a PDF in Explorer opens it as a new tab in the running app.

features.title: Carry it on a USB stick
features.desc: The portable .exe runs from anywhere. Settings travel in a folder next to the file — same setup across every PC you touch.

features.title: Convert PDF to Word / Excel
features.desc: Export to .docx, .xlsx (pulls out tables), .jpg, .png. Compress PDFs to shrink file size without losing readability.

features.title: Password & permissions
features.desc: Protect PDFs with passwords, set print / copy / edit permissions. Add Bates numbering for legal work, watermarks, and hyperlinks.

features.title: Page management
features.desc: Merge, split, rotate, reorder, auto-crop, and number pages. Drag and drop page thumbnails to reorganise.

features.title: 100% offline & private
features.desc: No account, no cloud sync, no telemetry, no analytics, no watermark. The only network call is the optional one-time OCR download.

sysReqs: ~250 MB free disk space (installed) or ~110 MB (portable .exe alone)
2 GB RAM minimum (4 GB recommended for large PDFs)
Internet only needed once, for the optional Tesseract OCR download (~80 MB)
No admin rights required for the portable build
No account, no subscription, no internet otherwise

notes: Initial public release — installer and portable builds in one ZIP
Edit text in place — click a word, type the new text, keeps the original font
Place images freeform with resize, rotate, lock aspect, snap to page width
OCR scanned PDFs with Tesseract (auto-downloads on first use, offline thereafter)
One-click signature — draw once, drop on any document
Multi-PDF tabs — double-click in Explorer adds a new tab
Stacked OCR-layer detection — cleans up "Regarding Regarding" doubling
Convert PDF to Word (.docx), Excel (.xlsx), JPG, PNG; compress PDFs
Page management — merge, split, rotate, reorder, auto-crop, Bates numbering
Password protection, watermarks, hyperlinks, page numbers
F1 / Help menu / right-click → guided first-time tour replay
Portable .exe — no install, runs from USB, settings travel with the file

howTo.name: How to edit a PDF for free on Windows
howTo.description: Edit text, add a signature and OCR a scanned PDF on Windows 10 or 11 using RBS PDF Editor — free, offline, no watermark, no account required.
supply: The PDF you want to edit

steps.name: Download RBS PDF Editor
steps.text: Download the free 216 MB ZIP from rarebuildsoftware.com. The ZIP contains both an installer and a portable .exe — pick whichever you prefer. No account, no email, no payment required.

steps.name: Open your PDF
steps.text: Run the app, drag your PDF onto the window (or click Open PDF). The document opens as a tab — open more PDFs to add more tabs.

steps.name: Edit text in place
steps.text: Click the Edit Text tool, then click any word in the PDF. A yellow box opens with the current text. Type the replacement and press Enter. The original font and size are preserved.

steps.name: OCR a scanned PDF (optional)
steps.text: If your PDF is a scan, click the OCR button on the toolbar, pick Searchable PDF. The app downloads Tesseract OCR once (about 80 MB), then runs offline forever. After OCR you can search, copy and edit text.

steps.name: Sign the document (optional)
steps.text: Open More menu → Signature. Draw your signature once with the mouse. After that, drop your saved signature on any document in one click. Stored only on your computer.

steps.name: Save the result
steps.text: Click Done at the top. Pick Overwrite to save in place, or Save as new to keep the original untouched. No watermark is added, ever.

name: RBS Optimizer Pro

features.title: Startup Manager

features.desc: Real-time graphs for CPU, RAM, and disk usage so you always know what's running.

features.title: One-Click Optimize
features.desc: Single button runs a full system tune-up — clean, optimize, and boost all at once.

features.title: Privacy First

name: RBS Voice Cloner

features.title: Text to Speech
features.desc: Convert any text to natural speech using your cloned voice profiles.

features.title: Audio Editor
features.desc: Built-in audio editor with waveform view, trim, noise reduction and pitch control.

NVIDIA GPU with CUDA recommended (CPU works but slower)

name: RBS Voice Cloner V2
description: Major V2 release of the free AI voice cloner. 16 built-in voices plus unlimited custom clones from a 30-second sample, 17 languages with auto-translate, 7-band parametric equaliser with voice presets, and a redesigned audio editor (cut · fade · merge · normalise · live waveform cursor). 100% offline after the one-time model download.

features.title: 16 Built-in Voices + Unlimited Clones
features.desc: 6 male, 6 female, 2 boy, 2 girl ready to go. Plus clone any voice from a 30-second sample and save unlimited custom voice profiles.

features.title: 17 Languages + Auto-Translate
features.desc: Native XTTS v2 generation in English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Polish, Turkish, Russian, Dutch, Czech, Arabic, Chinese, Japanese, Hungarian, Korean, Hindi. Translator built into the TTS page.

features.title: 7-Band Parametric Equaliser
features.desc: Voice-tuned EQ (Sub 60 Hz / Bass 200 Hz / Low Mid 500 Hz / Mid 1.5 kHz / Hi Mid 3.5 kHz / Presence 8 kHz / Air 12 kHz) with 6 presets — Natural, Warm, Bright, Podcast, Phone, Flat.

features.title: Redesigned Audio Editor
features.desc: Hero waveform with live playback cursor, drag-to-select with right-click Cut / Delete / Crop / Copy, tabbed effects (Quick · Adjust · Trim & Fade · Equaliser), and full keyboard shortcuts.

features.title: GPU Accelerated (CUDA 12.x / 13.x)
features.desc: Ships PyTorch with CUDA 12.8 runtime — 5–10× faster than CPU. Falls back to CPU automatically if no CUDA GPU is present. Diagnose page (Ctrl+D) shows GPU vs CPU mode.

features.title: Fully Offline After Setup
features.desc: XTTS v2 model loads locally, no telemetry, no cloud. Internet only needed for the one-time ~2 GB model download and the optional translator.

sysReqs: 10 GB free disk space (for models + generated audio)
NVIDIA GPU with CUDA recommended (RTX 3060 or better) — CPU fallback supported
Internet connection on first launch (downloads XTTS v2 model ~2 GB)

notes: 16 built-in voices — 6 Male, 6 Female, 2 Boy, 2 Girl

name: RBS PC Cleaner
description: Honest Windows maintenance utility with real numbers, reversible changes, and no fake scores. Clean junk safely, manage startup, find duplicates, uninstall in bulk, apply 9 theme packs — and never touch the registry.

features.title: Safe Junk Cleaner
features.desc: Temp, recycle bin, Windows Update cache, prefetch, logs — each rated Safe / Caution / Risky, nothing deleted without confirmation.

features.title: Browser Cleaner
features.desc: Clears cache, cookies, history for Chrome, Edge, Firefox, Brave, Opera. Saved passwords are reported but never deleted.

features.title: App Cache Cleaner
features.desc: Wipes Discord, Microsoft Teams, Spotify, VS Code, Slack, Zoom cache in one click.

features.title: Disk Analyzer
features.desc: Read-only folder tree — see exactly what is using your space and drill down click by click.

features.title: Duplicate Finder
features.desc: Hash-based duplicate detection, always keeps the oldest file, auto-skips Windows and Program Files.

features.title: Bulk Uninstaller
features.desc: Tick multiple installed programs and uninstall in sequence — silent mode when supported.

features.title: Startup Manager
features.desc: Toggle any startup entry on/off. Disabled entries are parked in a sibling key — fully reversible.

features.title: Gaming Mode
features.desc: One click: safe clean + memory trim + High-Performance power plan + suspend background apps. Resume brings everything back.

features.title: 9 Theme Packs
features.desc: Real icon packs + matching 2560×1440 wallpapers + taskbar accent. Reversible with one click — Restore Original.

features.title: Scheduler
features.desc: Daily or weekly silent auto-clean via Windows Task Scheduler.

features.title: Safety Gate
features.desc: Blocks deletion inside C:\Windows, Program Files, ProgramData, drive roots — and never scans the registry.

features.title: Portable Mode
features.desc: Store settings + backups next to the exe — perfect for USB sticks and IT technicians.

sysReqs: No Python installation required — everything bundled
Administrator rights needed for drive-icon overrides, HKLM startup entries, and Windows Temp cleanup
Installer (recommended) or portable ZIP — both supported

notes: Initial public release
Junk, browser, and app cache cleaners with Safe/Caution/Risky ratings

Bulk uninstaller with silent-mode support
Startup manager with reversible disable
Gaming Mode with Resume button

Scheduled auto-clean via Task Scheduler
Portable mode and installer options
Central safety gate — never scans or modifies the registry
